data.name: Company has an approved Human Resource Security Policy
data.description: This test verifies that your company has an approved [Human Resource Security Policy](/policies/human-resource-security-policy-bsi) in Vanta.
data.failureDescription: You don't have an approved Human Resource Security Policy yet.
data.remediationDescription: Use our [policy templates](/policies?policy=Human%20Resource%20Security%20Policy) to create and approve a custom Human Resource Security Policy for your company.

data.name: Security awareness training selected
data.description: This test checks whether your organization has selected a general security awareness training program. Choosing a training program is the first step to ensure employees receive education on fundamental security best practices.
data.failureDescription: You don't have a specified Security Awareness Training provider.
data.remediationDescription: Assign the General Security Awareness training to your personnel on the [Groups](/groups) Page.

data.name: General security awareness training records tracked
data.description: This test verifies that all employees have completed general security awareness training and that their completion is tracked within Vanta. This helps ensure that everyone is aware of essential security protocols and best practices.
data.failureDescription: Vanta cannot find records that indicate that all of your employees have completed the required general security training.
data.remediationDescription: Use the [People page](/people) to track the status of new personnel. Every employee must indicate whether they have completed required security trainings.
